creator: myleal@tcoip.com.br
text:
Suggestion: The games/fsgs port should sed $PREFIX/fsgs/fsgs.cfg and change 'opt' to $PREFIX. It should be nice if the install script also configures the option InternetAddress in the same config file, or warns the user to not forget to config it.

Fix: 

Patch the config file.
How-To-Repeat: Just install the package, and you will see that the game server does not starts with the default config file.
